◎译　　名　文化大教堂 / Cathedrals of Culture

◎年　　代　2014

◎编　　剧　卡里姆·埃诺兹 Karim Ainouz / 玛格丽特·欧林 Margreth Olin / 维姆·文德斯 Wim Wenders

◎简　　介  

　　'If buildings could talk, what would they say about us?' Cathedrals of Culture offers six startling responses to this question. This 3D film project about the soul of buildings allows six iconic and very different buildings to speak for themselves, examining human life from the unblinking perspective of a manmade structure. Six acclaimed filmmakers bring their own visual style ...
